posts.title: 莫反基础练习题
posts.text: link 显然能拆分成两个问题： $$F_{type,0}(a,b,c) = \prod \limits_{i=1}^a \prod \limits_{j=1}^b \prod \limits_{k=1}^c i^{f(type)}\F_{type,1}(a,b,c) = \prod \limits_{i=1}^a \prod \limits_{j=1}^b \prod \limits_{k=1}^c \gcd(i,j)^{f(type)} \F_{type}(a,b,c) = \frac{F_{type,0}(a,b,c) F_{type,0}(b,a,c)}{F_{type,1}(a,b,c) F_{type,1}(a,c,b)} \$$ $type=0$$$F_{0,0}(a,b,c) = (a!)^{bc} \F_{0,1}(a,b,c) = \prod \limits_{i=1}^a \prod \limits_{j=1}^b \gcd(i,j)^{c} = \prod \limits_{d=1}^{\min(a,b)} d^{c\left(\sum \limits_{t=1} \mu(t) \left\lfloor \frac a{dt} \right\rfloor \left\lfloor \frac b{dt} \right\rfloor\right)} \= \prod \limits_{T=1} \left(\prod \limits_{d|T} d^{\mu\left(\frac Td\right)}\right)^{\left\lfloor\frac aT\right\rfloor\left\lfloor \frac bT \right\rfloor c}$$ 括号里跟狄利克雷卷积一样，然后预处理前缀积，其他整除分块，所以预处理复杂度 $\Theta(n \log n)$，单次复杂度 $\Theta\left(\sqrt{a} \log a\right)$。 $type=1$$$F_{1,0}(a, b, c) = \left(\prod \limits_{i=1}^a i^i\right)^{g(b) g(c)}\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ g(x) = \frac{x(x+1)}2 \F_{1,1}(a,b,c) = \prod \limits_{i=1}^a \prod \limits_{j=1}^b \gcd(i,j)^{i\times j\times g(c)} = \prod \limits_{d=1}^{\min(a,b)} d^{ g(c)d^2\sum \limits_{i=1}^{a/d} \sum \limits_{j=1}^{b/d} \sum \limits_{t|i,t|j} \mu(t) ij } \= \left(\prod \limits_{d=1}^{\min(a,b)} d^{d^2 \sum \limits_{t=1} \mu(t)t^2 g\left(\frac a{td}\right)g\left(\frac b{td}\right)}\right)^{g(c)} \= \left( \prod \limits_{T=1} \left( \prod \limits_{d|T} d^{\mu\left(\frac Td\right)} \right)^{T^2 g\left(\frac aT\right) g\left(\frac bT\right)} \right)^{g(c)}$$ 预处理类似狄利克雷卷积的部分，然后求前缀积就能整除分块做了，时间和 $type=0$ 相同。 $type=2$标算太麻烦了，我们充分发扬人类智慧，想到 $\exp,\ln$（想过没想过真的能用）$$F_{2}(a,b,c) = \exp \sum \limits_{i=1}^a \sum \limits_{j=1}^b \sum \limits_{k=1}^c \gcd(i,j,k)\ln\left(\frac{\text{lcm}(i,j)}{\gcd(i,j)}\right) \= \exp \sum \limits_{d=1}^{\min(a,b,c)} \varphi(d) \sum \limits_{i=1}^{\left\lfloor\frac Ad\right\rfloor} \sum \limits_{j=1}^{\left\lfloor \frac Bd\right\rfloor} \sum \limits_{k=1}^{\left\lfloor \frac Cd\right\rfloor} \ln\left(\frac{\text{lcm}(i,j)}{\gcd(i,j)}\right) \= \prod \limits_{d=1}^{\min(a,b,c)} F_{0}^{\varphi(d)}\left(\left\lfloor \frac Ad \right\rfloor, \left\lfloor\frac Bd\right\rfloor, \left\lfloor\frac Cd\right\rfloor\right)$$直接求就是 $\Theta\left(a^{\frac34}\log a\right)$。

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
